scene_description: A person models an outfit in a studio setting. They walk into the frame, stop at the center, and strike a series of poses, including lifting each leg to look at their shoes.

motion_script.action: A person walks from screen left to the center, turning to face the camera as they stop.
The person stands still, posing and looking directly into the camera.
The person lifts their right leg, knee bent, looks down, and touches their shoe with their right hand.
While holding the pose, the person looks up at the camera, then lowers their leg.
The person lifts their left leg, knee bent, leans down, and touches their shoe with their left hand.
While holding the pose, the person looks up at the camera.
The person lowers their leg and poses with their left hand on their hip.

composition_notes: The shot is a static, continuous take. The camera is stationary and positioned at the subject's eye level. The vertical framing keeps the subject centered, emphasizing the full-body view.

style.color_treatment: Natural, with slightly cool and desaturated tones
style.lighting_effects: Even, diffuse studio lighting creating soft, minimal shadows

shot_backgrounds: Photo studio with a seamless grey paper backdrop and a concrete floor.
